stimulus: In 1965, Indian native and engineer Kalpana Chawla left her teaching position at the Punjab Engineering College ______blank a graduate program in aerospace engineering at the University of Texas.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The convention being tested is the use of nonfinite verb forms. The to-infinitive “to pursue” correctly forms a subordinate clause expressing why Chawla left her position (to pursue a graduate program).

Choices B, C, and D are all finite verb forms that would create either a comma splice or a run-on by joining two independent clauses without proper punctuation or conjunction.
